temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) In a dimly lit, narrow alley at night, a man in a light-colored suit jacket and a patterned shirt is on the phone. He looks agitated and gestures with his free hand as he speaks. Other people are walking past him in the crowded alley, and a small, bright light, possibly a flashlight or a distant streetlamp, moves through the scene. (Storyline: The scene opens on a tense moment, establishing a character in a state of distress or urgency while on a phone call in a foreign, unfamiliar location.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Agitated, slightly panicked. 2) Background sounds: Muffled sounds of a crowd, indistinct chatter.)
(00:04-00:07) The man on the phone becomes more agitated, shouting into the phone. He gestures emphatically with his hands, his face contorted with frustration and disbelief as he argues with the person on the other end of the line. (Storyline: The conflict escalates as the man's frustration boils over. His plea for the other person to come back and his angry outburst suggest a serious, unresolved problem.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Shouting, angry, and exasperated. 2) Background sounds: Continued ambient noise of the alley.)
